cta.description: Join the first donors who want to know exactly where their money goes.
cta.title: Ready to give differently?

items.question: Are my donations tax-deductible?
items.answer: Yes. For each donation to an eligible association, you receive a valid tax receipt allowing you to benefit from the tax reduction provided by law (66% of the amount, up to 20% of taxable income for individuals).

items.question: How can I track my donation?
items.answer: From your dashboard, you can see in real time the expenses related to the projects you support. Each expense comes with verifiable proof: receipts, dates, amounts.

items.question: When do I receive my tax receipt?
items.answer: Instantly. As soon as your donation is confirmed, the tax receipt is available in your account. No more waiting for the association's mail at the end of the year.

items.question: Can I donate to multiple associations?
items.answer: Of course. You can support as many partner associations as you wish. Each donation is tracked individually and you receive a tax receipt per association.

items.question: Is my data protected?
items.answer: Absolutely. We comply with GDPR and never share your personal data with third parties. Your tax information is encrypted and used solely to generate your receipts.

hero.description: Track the use of every euro donated. Monitor in real time the expenses of the associations you support, with verifiable proof.

associations.text: "Proving our good management takes forever." Associations spend hundreds of hours producing reports to reassure their funders.
associations.title: Association side

donors.text: "I don't know how my money is being used." 6 out of 10 donors want more transparency on how their donations are used.
donors.title: Donor side

items.question: Do I need to understand blockchain to use Common Link?
items.answer: No, absolutely not. Common Link is designed to be as simple as a bank transfer. The blockchain works in the background, you never need to interact with it directly.

items.question: How are donations tracked?
items.answer: Each donation is converted to stablecoin (EUR CoinVertible) and recorded on the Ethereum blockchain. Each association expense is also recorded with a timestamped receipt.

items.question: Do I receive a tax receipt?
items.answer: Yes. Each donation automatically generates a digital tax receipt in the form of an NFT, which you can download or keep in your donor space.

items.question: Which associations can register?
items.answer: Any association registered in the SIRENE directory can register for free. Verification is automatic.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Registration is free for associations and donors. Common Link charges a 2.5% commission on each donation to fund the platform and blockchain fees.

items.question: Is the data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Personal data is stored encrypted and GDPR compliant. Only transaction proofs are public on the blockchain (without personal data).

items.title: Total transparency
items.text: Every donation is recorded with unfalsifiable cryptographic proof. Donors see exactly where their money goes.

items.title: Verifiable proof
items.text: Every expense comes with a timestamped and verified receipt. No more opaque reports.

items.title: Total simplicity
items.text: No need to understand blockchain. Donors give in euros, associations spend in euros.

guarantee.text: Our technology relies on the Ethereum blockchain and regulated stablecoins. Every transaction is immutable, publicly verifiable, and compliant with European regulations.
guarantee.title: Traceability guarantee

architecture.description: Every donation is tracked end-to-end. Blockchain technology serves as a proof ledger, but remains invisible to end users.

steps.title: 1. Receiving the donation in euros
steps.text: The donor gives in euros through the platform. Zero friction, zero crypto jargon.

steps.title: 2. Conversion to EURCV
steps.text: Funds are converted to euro stablecoin (EURCV) via our institutional partner, ensuring compliance and auditability.

steps.title: 3. On-chain transfer to the association
steps.text: EURCV tokens are transferred to the association's wallet. Every movement is recorded on the blockchain.

steps.title: 4. Allocation & expenses
steps.text: The association distributes funds among its members. Every payment is tracked, with EURCV → EUR reconversion for bank transfers.

steps.title: 5. Proofs & NFT tax receipt
steps.text: At each step, a proof is recorded on-chain. The donor receives their tax receipt as an NFT, accessible at any time.

architecture.title: Architecture & fund flow
